Title: Update application logo globally
Description: Replace current logo asset across app shell (header/login/branding touchpoints).
Acceptance Criteria: Logo updated everywhere; no broken image links; caches cleared/updated.
Notes/Dependencies: Await final logo asset if not already provided.

Title: Enable editing Contact Email Address on Contact Detail
Description: Allow users to edit the Contact Email Address field on the contact detail page.
Acceptance Criteria: Email field is editable; validates email format; saves successfully; reflected in lists/related views.
Notes/Dependencies: Ensure permissions align with role-based editing.

Title: Fix Contact Type inheritance + update when Account Type changes
Description: Ensure Contact Type inherits from the associated Account Type and updates if Account Type changes.
Acceptance Criteria: Creating contact auto-populates Contact Type from Account; changing Account Type updates all linked Contacts (or per decided rule); audit log created.
Notes/Dependencies: Confirm if retroactive update should apply to all contacts or only those not manually overridden (ASSUMED: always inherit).

Title: Fix incorrect Opportunity association shown on Contact (Jordan Cole / Algave Cloud Migration)
Description: Remove unrelated opportunities from a contact’s Opportunities tab unless the contact has a role/house rep association on the opportunity.
Acceptance Criteria: Contact only shows opportunities where contact is linked via role or house rep; regression test with known example.
Notes/Dependencies: May require tightening query join logic on contact-opportunity relationships.

Title: Layout tweak: move 'Same as Bill To' checkbox above Bill To Address label
Description: Adjust Contact detail UI layout so checkbox sits just above the Bill To Address section label.
Acceptance Criteria: Checkbox appears immediately above section label; no overlap; responsive layout intact.
Notes/Dependencies: UI-only change.

Title: New Contact form: balanced 2-column layout
Description: Redesign New Contact modal/form into a visually balanced 2-column layout.
Acceptance Criteria: Form renders 2 columns on desktop widths; collapses cleanly on smaller widths; no field truncation.
Notes/Dependencies: Align with existing design system spacing/typography.

Title: New Contact form: First/Last as separate underlined fields with single 'Name' label
Description: Adjust name entry UI: two underlined inputs for First and Last name under one 'Name' label.
Acceptance Criteria: Two inputs render under one label; both required; validation messages correct.
Notes/Dependencies: UI-only.

Title: Work Phone formatting + validation + extension placement
Description: Work Phone must format as xxx-xxx-xxxx; Extension sits next to Work Phone in same column; invalid length shows inline error.
Acceptance Criteria: Phone auto-formats; rejects non-10-digit; shows inline error; extension field aligned next to phone; saves correctly.
Notes/Dependencies: Confirm whether to store normalized digits or formatted string (ASSUMED: store digits; format on display).

Title: Remove 'Description' from New Contact form
Description: Remove Description field from New Contact creation form.
Acceptance Criteria: Description field absent on create; existing Description on detail (if any) unchanged.
Notes/Dependencies: If field still needed later, keep in edit/detail only.

Title: Prevent Opportunities on House Accounts
Description: Enforce business rule: Accounts designated as House cannot have Opportunities created/associated.
Acceptance Criteria: UI blocks opportunity creation when Account Type=House; API/server validates and rejects with clear message; existing invalid data handled (if any).
Notes/Dependencies: Need to define Account Type/flag that represents House (ASSUMED: Account Type == 'House').

Title: Default Account Owner to main Admin when creating House account during setup
Description: When setting up an Account as House, default Account Owner to main Admin user.
Acceptance Criteria: On House account creation, Account Owner auto-set to Admin; user can override if permitted; saves correctly.
Notes/Dependencies: Define 'main Admin' selection logic (ASSUMED: first admin / tenant owner).

Title: Typeahead fields: show dropdown arrow to open options (Parent Account)
Description: Add dropdown indicator allowing users to open suggestions list without typing for Parent Account field.
Acceptance Criteria: Dropdown arrow visible; clicking shows A–Z list; typing filters list; selection works.
Notes/Dependencies: Apply to similar typeahead controls where applicable.

Title: Parent Account create-on-miss prompt (tab/click away)
Description: If user enters a Parent Account name that doesn’t exist, prompt to create new Parent Account when they tab/click away.
Acceptance Criteria: Non-matching entry triggers modal/prompt; user can create or cancel; on create, new account saved and linked as Parent; no duplicates created.
Notes/Dependencies: Requires safe-guard against near-duplicates and archived duplicates (if archive exists).

Title: Default 'Same as Ship To' checked + pre-populated; unchecking clears
Description: Default billing/shipping link behavior: Same as Ship To checked by default and pre-populates; unchecking clears dependent fields.
Acceptance Criteria: On new/edit account, checkbox defaults checked; billing fields mirror ship-to; uncheck clears billing fields; re-check re-copies.
Notes/Dependencies: Confirm which direction is source-of-truth (ASSUMED: Ship To -> Bill To).

Title: After Add User → Save, redirect to User List
Description: After saving a new user in Admin, return user to the User List page.
Acceptance Criteria: On Save success, route navigates to user list; toast confirmation shown; no double-submit.
Notes/Dependencies: UI navigation fix.

Title: New user remains Inactive until invitation accepted
Description: Ensure new users remain Inactive until they accept the invite email; align behavior with popup copy.
Acceptance Criteria: New user status=Inactive post-create; becomes Active only after acceptance; audit log entry recorded.
Notes/Dependencies: Confirm email invite workflow and token expiration rules.

Title: Require at least one Role contact before saving Opportunity
Description: Opportunity creation must require at least one Role contact prior to Save/Complete.
Acceptance Criteria: Save blocked until at least one role contact added; inline error shown; server validation prevents bypass.
Notes/Dependencies: Need definition of role contact entity and where stored (ASSUMED: OpportunityContactRole table).

Title: Role lookup restricted to Account contacts or Parent Account contacts
Description: When selecting Role contact, only show contacts from the Opportunity’s Account and its Parent Account (corporate buyer).
Acceptance Criteria: Role contact dropdown/search only returns eligible contacts; selecting ineligible contact blocked.
Notes/Dependencies: Confirm parent-account relationship is single-level or multi-level (ASSUMED: single-level).

Title: Default Subagent to None
Description: Set Subagent default value to None (not blank) on Opportunity create.
Acceptance Criteria: Subagent field defaults to None; Save works without selecting subagent; value stored consistently.
Notes/Dependencies: Align with Subagent % enable/disable logic.

Title: Default Referred By to None
Description: Set Referred By default to None (not blank / not 'No House Rep').
Acceptance Criteria: Referred By defaults to None; user can select; value saved; no auto-populated incorrect values.
Notes/Dependencies: May be superseded by House Rep renaming ticket.

Title: Clarify/implement Referred By vs House Rep field behavior
Description: Either remove Referred By, or rename/replace with House Rep that defaults to current user and restricts selectable values to House contacts/employees.
Acceptance Criteria: Chosen approach implemented: field label and behavior match; defaults correct; selection restricted; downstream reporting updated.
Notes/Dependencies: Decision needed: remove vs rename (ASSUMED: rename to House Rep).

Title: Add dropdown arrow + full A–Z list to typeahead/dropdowns (Subagent/Referred By etc.)
Description: Add dropdown arrow to open full list for all typeahead fields (Subagent, Referred By/House Rep, etc.).
Acceptance Criteria: Arrow visible; clicking opens list; list sorted A–Z; typing filters; selection persists.
Notes/Dependencies: Should align with global dropdown/typeahead standard ticket.

Title: Subagent % disabled unless Subagent selected; enforce 0.01–99.99%
Description: If no subagent selected, Subagent % is disabled and not required. If subagent selected, % is required and validated >0.01% and ≤99.99%.
Acceptance Criteria: Subagent % disabled when subagent=None; enabled when selected; validation messages show; saves only with valid range; server validates range.
Notes/Dependencies: Confirm percent stored as 0–100 vs 0–1 (ASSUMED: 0–100).

Title: Fix Opportunity billing/shipping addresses not displaying on main Opportunity page
Description: Ensure Billing + Shipping addresses are populated and displayed on Opportunity main view as expected.
Acceptance Criteria: On Opportunity create, addresses pull from Account; displayed on Opportunity; editing Account updates opportunity per rule (ASSUMED: snapshot at creation).
Notes/Dependencies: Need to confirm snapshot vs live-link behavior; avoid null concatenation.

Title: Fix Expected Commission Rate display formatting (0.16% vs 16.00%)
Description: Fix percentage formatting where 16% displays as 0.16% in product contexts.
Acceptance Criteria: Rate displays correctly in list + detail + create flows; stored value consistent; regression tests for calculations unaffected.
Notes/Dependencies: Likely 0–1 vs 0–100 conversion bug.

Title: Create Product popup: add dropdown arrows + full dropdown lists for Distributor/Vendor/Family/Subtype
Description: Add dropdown arrow controls and full list selection for Distributor Name, Vendor Name, House Product Family, House Product Subtype.
Acceptance Criteria: Arrow visible; opens full list; list sorted; filters; selection persists; dependent cascading works.
Notes/Dependencies: Ensure vendor list filtered by distributor, family/subtype filtered appropriately.

Title: Create Product popup: duplicate product detection (warn/block)
Description: Detect if a product already exists (by key fields) and warn or prevent duplicate creation.
Acceptance Criteria: On attempted duplicate, user sees warning; can cancel; system blocks hard duplicates; optional merge path (if supported).
Notes/Dependencies: Define matching keys (ASSUMED: Distributor+Vendor+Family+Subtype+Product Name).

Title: Create Product popup: fix non-required fields blocking Save
Description: Fields that are not required must not block Save (Other Product Name, Vendor Part #, Other Part Number, Other Product Description).
Acceptance Criteria: User can save with those fields blank; required validation only triggers on required fields; server validation aligned.
Notes/Dependencies: Re-check schema constraints and frontend validation schema.

Title: Create Product popup: remove pre-filled example placeholders/tooltips
Description: Remove example default text (e.g., “Cable Services…”, “PN-123…”) so fields are blank by default.
Acceptance Criteria: New product form fields start blank; placeholders are generic labels only; no sample data saved accidentally.
Notes/Dependencies: UI/UX cleanup.

Title: Product Detail: add dropdown arrow + larger dropdown for Product Family/Subtype
Description: Improve Product Family/Subtype editing with dropdown arrows and larger dropdown lists.
Acceptance Criteria: Arrow present; list scrolls internally; no page jump; selection saves; lists sized appropriately.
Notes/Dependencies: Also addresses dropdown UX issues on detail page.

Title: Fix dropdown UX bug: page scroll/jump when opening dropdown; scroll should be inside dropdown
Description: When opening a long dropdown (Family/Subtype), the page should not jump; scrolling should occur inside dropdown list.
Acceptance Criteria: Opening dropdown does not move viewport; dropdown list scrolls; keyboard navigation works; closes on blur/esc.
Notes/Dependencies: May require portal/popover positioning updates.

Title: Remove Vendor Part # field; rename Other Part Number (remove 'Aliases'); ensure deposit mapping targets Other Part Number
Description: Remove redundant Vendor Part # field from product; rename Other – Part Number (Aliases) to Other – Part Number; ensure deposit mapping writes to this field.
Acceptance Criteria: Vendor Part # removed from UI and schema (or hidden); renamed field appears; deposit matching/mapping updates correct field; no data loss (migrate values if needed).
Notes/Dependencies: Migration required if existing data lives in Vendor Part #.

Title: Fix underline styling for description fields (wrap-aware)
Description: Underline should sit under text and expand down as text wraps for House Description and Other Product Description.
Acceptance Criteria: Underline renders correctly for single/multi-line; no floating text effect; consistent typography.
Notes/Dependencies: CSS fix for text-decoration / border-bottom behaviors.

Title: Standardize typeahead/dropdown controls: add dropdown arrow + full A–Z list everywhere applicable
Description: Across the app, typeahead fields should include a dropdown arrow allowing users to open full list (A–Z where applicable).
Acceptance Criteria: All relevant typeahead controls show arrow; open list without typing; list sorted; consistent styling; no regressions.
Notes/Dependencies: Audit required: Parent Account, Subagent, Vendor Contact, Product selectors, etc.
